description_long: This is a tall, rectangular apartment building with a modern grid-like facade composed of evenly spaced horizontal and vertical structural elements. The exterior features large, blue-tinted glass windows arranged in a uniform pattern across all visible sides, giving the building a sleek and contemporary appearance. The structure sits on a broad, flat base that extends outward, possibly representing a plaza or parking area, with a row of streetlights or lamp posts lining one side. The roof is flat and dark, with small orange lights at the corners, suggesting safety or accent lighting. The building lacks visible balconies and has no ornate detailing, emphasizing functionality and simplicity. The entrance area is understated, with a few vertical elements that may represent doors or access points.
description: A tall, modern apartment building with a grid-like facade of blue-tinted windows, set on a wide base with streetlights along one side. The structure is sleek, rectangular, and lacks balconies or decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with a wide base, a row of streetlights, and the grid of windows clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the building and the alignment of streetlights along the left edge.
description_view_2: Rear view with the grid window pattern and fewer streetlights, emphasizing the building's symmetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the row of streetlights now on the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a highly regular, grid-like pattern with even spacing both vertically and horizontally, creating a symmetrical and orderly appearance on all sides.
